title: Marketplace Manager - Meesho South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Meesho South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Meesho South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meesho South Asia Partners:
Meesho South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho South Asia Partners!
